name: Java-OpenJDK
description: An optimization pack for optimizing OpenJDK based JVMs (version 8, 11, 17)

componentTypes.name: java-openjdk-11
componentTypes.description: The component type of Java OpenJDK and Oracle HotSpot version 11

componentTypes.name: java-openjdk-17
componentTypes.description: The component type of Java OpenJDK version 17

componentTypes.name: java-openjdk-8
componentTypes.description: The component type of Java OpenJDK and Oracle HotSpot version 8

metrics.name: cpu_util
metrics.description: The average CPU utilization % across all the CPUs (i.e., how much time on average the CPUs are busy doing work)

metrics.name: mem_used
metrics.description: The total amount of memory used

metrics.name: cpu_used
metrics.description: The total amount of CPUs used

metrics.name: jvm_heap_size
metrics.description: The size of the JVM heap memory

metrics.name: jvm_heap_used
metrics.description: The amount of heap memory used

metrics.name: jvm_off_heap_used
metrics.description: The amount of non-heap memory used

metrics.name: jvm_heap_old_gen_used
metrics.description: The amount of heap memory used (old generation)

metrics.name: jvm_heap_young_gen_used
metrics.description: The amount of heap memory used (young generation)

metrics.name: jvm_heap_old_gen_size
metrics.description: The size of the JVM heap memory (old generation)

metrics.name: jvm_heap_committed
metrics.description: The size of the JVM committed memory

metrics.name: jvm_heap_young_gen_size
metrics.description: The size of the JVM heap memory (young generation)

metrics.name: jvm_heap_util
metrics.description: The utilization % of heap memory

metrics.name: jvm_memory_used
metrics.description: The total amount of memory used across all the JVM memory pools

metrics.name: jvm_memory_buffer_pool_used
metrics.description: The total amount bytes used by buffers within the JVM buffer memory pool

metrics.name: jvm_gc_time
metrics.description: The % of wall clock time the JVM spent doing stop the world garbage collection activities

metrics.name: jvm_gc_count
metrics.description: The total number of stop the world JVM garbage collections that have occurred per second

metrics.name: jvm_gc_duration
metrics.description: The average duration of a stop the world JVM garbage collection

metrics.name: jvm_threads_current
metrics.description: The total number of active threads within the JVM

metrics.name: jvm_threads_deadlocked
metrics.description: The total number of deadlocked threads within the JVM

metrics.name: jvm_compilation_time
metrics.description: The total time spent by the JVM JIT compiler compiling bytecode

parameters.name: jvm_activeProcessorCount
parameters.description: Overrides the number of detected CPUs that the VM will use to calculate the size of thread pools.

parameters.name: jvm_maxHeapSize
parameters.description: The maximum heap size.

parameters.name: jvm_minHeapSize
parameters.description: The minimum heap size.

parameters.name: jvm_maxRAM
parameters.description: The maximum amount of memory used by the JVM.

parameters.name: jvm_initialRAMPercentage
parameters.description: The percentage of memory used for initial heap size.

parameters.name: jvm_maxRAMPercentage
parameters.description: The percentage of memory used for maximum heap size, on systems with large physical memory size (more than 512MB).

parameters.name: jvm_minRAMPercentage
parameters.description: The percentage of memory used for maximum heap size, on systems with small physical memory size (up to 256MB).

parameters.name: jvm_newSize
parameters.description: Sets the initial and maximum size of the heap for the young generation (nursery).

parameters.name: jvm_maxNewSize
parameters.description: Specifies the upper bound for the young generation size.

parameters.name: jvm_minHeapFreeRatio
parameters.description: The minimum percentage of heap free after garbage collection to avoid shrinking.

parameters.name: jvm_maxHeapFreeRatio
parameters.description: The maximum percentage of heap free after garbage collection to avoid shrinking.

parameters.name: jvm_maxTenuringThreshold
parameters.description: The maximum value for the tenuring threshold.

parameters.name: jvm_survivorRatio
parameters.description: The ratio between the Eden and each Survivor-space within the JVM. For example, a jvm_survivorRatio would mean that the Eden-space is 6 times one Survivor-space.

parameters.name: jvm_concurrentGCThreads
parameters.description: Number of threads concurrent garbage collection will use.

parameters.name: jvm_parallelGCThreads
parameters.description: The number of threads garbage collection will use for parallel phases.

parameters.name: jvm_gcType
parameters.description: Type of the garbage collection algorithm.

parameters.name: jvm_maxGCPauseMillis
parameters.description: The adaptive size policy maximum GC pause time goal.

parameters.name: jvm_GCTimeRatio
parameters.description: The target fraction of time that can be spent in garbage collection before increasing the heap, computed as 1 / (1 + GCTimeRatio).

parameters.name: jvm_useAdaptiveSizePolicy
parameters.description: Enable adaptive generation sizing. Disable coupled with jvm_targetSurvivorRatio.

parameters.name: jvm_adaptiveSizePolicyWeight
parameters.description: The weighting given to the current Garbage Collection time versus previous GC times when checking the timing goal.

parameters.name: jvm_initiatingHeapOccupancyPercent
parameters.description: Sets the percentage of the heap occupancy at which to start a concurrent GC cycle.

parameters.name: jvm_youngGenerationSizeIncrement
parameters.description: The increment size for Young Generation adaptive resizing.

parameters.name: jvm_tenuredGenerationSizeIncrement
parameters.description: The increment size for Old/Tenured Generation adaptive resizing.

parameters.name: jvm_adaptiveSizeDecrementScaleFactor
parameters.description: Specifies the scale factor for goal-driven generation resizing.

parameters.name: jvm_targetSurvivorRatio
parameters.description: The desired percentage of Survivor-space used after young garbage collection.

parameters.name: jvm_CMSTriggerRatio
parameters.description: The percentage of MinHeapFreeRatio allocated before CMS GC starts.

parameters.name: jvm_CMSInitiatingOccupancyFraction
parameters.description: Configure oldgen occupancy fraction threshold for CMS GC. Negative values default to CMSTriggerRatio

parameters.name: jvm_CMSClassUnloadingEnabled
parameters.description: Enables class unloading when using CMS.

parameters.name: jvm_G1PeriodicGCInterval
parameters.description: The number of milliseconds after a previous GC to wait before triggering a periodic gc. A value of zero disables periodically enforced gc cycles.

parameters.name: jvm_G1HeapRegionSize
parameters.description: Sets the size of the regions for G1.

parameters.name: jvm_G1ReservePercent
parameters.description: Sets the percentage of the heap that is reserved as a false ceiling to reduce the possibility of promotion failure for the G1 collector.

parameters.name: jvm_G1NewSizePercent
parameters.description: Sets the percentage of the heap to use as the minimum for the young generation size.

parameters.name: jvm_G1MaxNewSizePercent
parameters.description: Sets the percentage of the heap size to use as the maximum for young generation size.

parameters.name: jvm_G1MixedGCLiveThresholdPercent
parameters.description: Sets the occupancy threshold for an old region to be included in a mixed garbage collection cycle.

parameters.name: jvm_G1HeapWastePercent
parameters.description: The maximum percentage of the reclaimable heap before starting mixed GC.

parameters.name: jvm_G1MixedGCCountTarget
parameters.description: Sets the target number of mixed garbage collections after a marking cycle to collect old regions with at most G1MixedGCLIveThresholdPercent live data. The default is 8 mixed garbage collections

parameters.name: jvm_G1OldCSetRegionThresholdPercent
parameters.description: The upper limit on the number of old regions to be collected during mixed GC.

parameters.name: jvm_G1AdaptiveIHOPNumInitialSamples
parameters.description: The number of completed time periods from initial mark to first mixed GC required to use the input values for prediction of the optimal occupancy to start marking.

parameters.name: jvm_G1UseAdaptiveIHOP
parameters.description: Adaptively adjust the initiating heap occupancy from the initial value of InitiatingHeapOccupancyPercent.

parameters.name: jvm_ZProactive
parameters.description: Enable proactive GC cycles.

parameters.name: jvm_ZUncommit
parameters.description: Enable uncommit (free) of unused heap memory back to the OS.

parameters.name: jvm_ZAllocationSpikeTolerance
parameters.description: The allocation spike tolerance factor for ZGC.

parameters.name: jvm_ZFragmentationLimit
parameters.description: The maximum allowed heap fragmentation for ZGC.

parameters.name: jvm_ZCollectionInterval
parameters.description: Force GC at a fixed time interval (in seconds) for ZGC.

parameters.name: jvm_ZMarkStackSpaceLimit
parameters.description: The maximum number of bytes allocated for mark stacks for ZGC.

parameters.name: jvm_metaspaceSize
parameters.description: The initial size of the allocated class metadata space.

parameters.name: jvm_maxMetaspaceSize
parameters.description: The maximum size of the allocated class metadata space.

parameters.name: jvm_useTransparentHugePages
parameters.description: Enables the use of large pages that can dynamically grow or shrink.

parameters.name: jvm_resizePLAB
parameters.description: Enables the dynamic resizing of promotion LABs.

parameters.name: jvm_useCMSInitiatingOccupancyOnly
parameters.description: Use of the occupancy value as the only criterion for initiating the CMS collector.

parameters.name: jvm_allocatePrefetchStyle
parameters.description: Selects the prefetch instruction to generate.

parameters.name: jvm_aggressiveHeap
parameters.description: Optimize heap options for long-running memory intensive apps.

parameters.name: jvm_aggressiveOpts
parameters.description: Enable experimental performance compiler optimizations.

parameters.name: jvm_useNUMA
parameters.description: Enable NUMA.

parameters.name: jvm_useBiasedLocking
parameters.description: Manage the use of biased locking.

parameters.name: jvm_usePerfData
parameters.description: Enable monitoring of performance data.

parameters.name: jvm_useLargePages
parameters.description: Enable the use of large page memory.

parameters.name: jvm_alwaysPreTouch
parameters.description: Pretouch pages during initialization.

parameters.name: jvm_reservedCodeCacheSize
parameters.description: Max size of the compiled code cache pool.

parameters.name: jvm_tieredCompilation
parameters.description: The type of the garbage collection algorithm.

parameters.name: jvm_tieredCompilationStopAtLevel
parameters.description: Set the maximum compilation level for the tiered mode, where 0 is interpreted mode.

parameters.name: jvm_compilationThreads
parameters.description: The number of compilation threads.

parameters.name: jvm_backgroundCompilation
parameters.description: Allow async interpreted execution of a method while it is being compiled.

parameters.name: jvm_allocatePrefetchInstr
parameters.description: Prefetch ahead of the allocation pointer.

parameters.name: jvm_allocatePrefetchLines
parameters.description: Number of lines to prefetch ahead of array allocation pointer.

parameters.name: jvm_allocatePrefetchDistance
parameters.description: Distance to prefetch ahead of allocation pointer. -1 use system-specific value (automatically determined)

parameters.name: jvm_inline
parameters.description: Enable inlining.

parameters.name: jvm_maxInlineSize
parameters.description: The bytecode size limit (in bytes) of the inlined methods.

parameters.name: jvm_maxInlineLevel
parameters.description: The maximum number of nested calls that are inlined by high tier compiler.

parameters.name: jvm_inlineSmallCode
parameters.description: Max compiled code size limit (in bytes) of the inlined methods.

parameters.name: jvm_freqInlineSize
parameters.description: The maximum number of bytecode instructions to inline for a method.

parameters.name: jvm_compilationMode
parameters.description: The JVM compilation mode.

parameters.name: jvm_typeProfileWidth
parameters.description: The number of receiver types to record in call/cast profile.

parameters.name: jvm_threadStackSize
parameters.description: The thread Stack Size (in Kbytes).

parameters.name: jvm_newRatio
parameters.description: The ratio of old/new generation sizes.

parameters.name: jvm_compileThresholdScaling
parameters.description: The scaling factor for the compile threshold.
